messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Database System

### DB System (VM)

```hcl
resource "oci_database_db_system" "db" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-db"

  availability_domain = "aaaa:US-ASHBURN-AD-1"
  subnet_id        = oci_core_subnet.db_subnet.id

  db_home {
    database {
      admin_password = "YourPassword123!"
      db_name       = "orcl"
      db_workload  = "OLTP"
    }

    model = "VM"
    version = "19.0.0.0"
  }

  shape = "VM.Standard2.2"
  cpu_core_count = 2
  memory_size_in_gbs = 32

  disk_redundancy = "NORMAL"
}
```

### Exadata

```hcl
resource "oci_database_exadata_db_system" "exadb" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name = "my-exadb"

  shape = "Exadata.Quarter2.84"
  cpu_core_count = 84

  storage_size_in_tb = 84
}
```
